biological_replicate: generated FOXK1 knockout (KO), FOXK2 KO, and FOXK1/FOXK2 double KO (DKO) HeLa cells
technical_replicate: colonies were counted manually or using ImageJ. Results were obtained from three independent experiments.
experimental_design: FOXK1 role in DNA damage response
FOXK1 Participates in DNA Damage Response by Controlling 53BP1 Function
factor_value: we show that FOXK1 associates with 53BP1 and regulates 53BP1-dependent functions.
